name: next-boilerplate
description: Production-grade multi-tenant SaaS starter on Next.js 16 with strict three-layer architecture.

layers.app: Next.js App Router — pages, layouts, route handlers. Thin glue importing both layers below.
layers.modules_next: Next.js binding layer — React components, hooks, *.service.next.ts extensions. Imports modules/* + Next/React.
layers.modules: Framework-agnostic business logic — services, DTOs, entities. No next/*, no react, no browser APIs.

conventions.architecture: Three layers, strict one-way dependency: app/ -> modules_next/ -> modules/. modules/ NEVER imports modules_next/ or app/.
conventions.scopes: Two URL scopes: system (super-admin, no tenant) under /system/... and tenant (per-tenant, resolved by proxy.ts) under /tenant/[tenantId]/.... Each has its own /admin, /api, /auth subtrees.
conventions.auth: JWT (httpOnly cookies), OTP, TOTP, SAML, OAuth (12+ providers via auth_sso), WebAuthn/Passkeys (user_security). Sessions: user_session (4 sub-services). Impersonation: always audited.
conventions.testing: Vitest + @testing-library/react. Tests colocated as *.test.ts / *.test.tsx beside the file under test. Run `npm test`.
conventions.security: Read SECURITY.md for the full threat model. Path alias is the single `@/*` -> `./*`. Multi-tenant data isolation enforced by per-tenant TypeORM DataSource (modules/db).

modules.name: Common Primitives
modules.description: Dependency-free leaf module loaded by every other module: AppError + ErrorCode enum (with retryable flag, statusCodeFor/isRetryable helpers) plus shared locale, country, currency, timezone, Money, pagination and log-context primitives.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: Runtime-discovered contribution sources (e.g. sandboxed community plugins). A contributor default-exports a source fn (tenantId, point) => ExternalContribution[]; hosts read it via listExternalContributions().

modules.name: Environment
modules.description: Zod-validated env var access. Single source of truth — never read process.env directly outside this module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Logger
modules.description: Winston-based structured logger. Use instead of console.* across the codebase.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Network
modules.description: Network primitives: subnet (CIDR) allowlist matching, address classification, and the shared types/enums for IP-based access control. Dependency-free leaf module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Redis
modules.description: Shared ioredis client + BullMQ connection helpers + Pub/Sub-safe createRedisConnection().
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Database
modules.description: TypeORM DataSource factory — single shared DB for all entities, optional per-tenant DB override via TenantDatabase.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Rate Limiter
modules.description: Sliding-window rate limiter + tenant-plan-based quota enforcement (seat/feature/usage limits).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Observability
modules.description: Sentry + Prometheus + OTel facade. Auto-tags every log/trace/metric with the active tenantId/userId/requestId via Logger AsyncLocalStorage context. Lazy-loaded — no-op when SENTRY_DSN / METRICS_ENABLED / OTEL_ENABLED are unset.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Idempotency Keys
modules.description: Redis-backed idempotency-key store for safely retryable POST/PATCH operations.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Setting
modules.description: System-wide key-value settings store. Modules declare their keys in *.setting.keys.ts; the setting service stores/reads them.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: User Agent Parser
modules.description: Parse User-Agent header into device/OS/browser metadata. Used to annotate sessions and audit logs.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Marketplace
modules.description: Browse, install, activate, and remove tenant modules; publish your own modules to a curated, approval-gated registry.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Plugin Runtime
modules.description: Sandboxed execution runtime for untrusted community plugins (V8 isolates, brokered capabilities, no direct DB access).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Seed
modules.description: Demo-data seeding framework. Each domain module ships a <module>.seed.ts exporting seed<Module>(ctx); the runner invokes them in dependency order against a target tenant.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: File Storage
modules.description: Pluggable S3-compatible file storage (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, DigitalOcean Spaces, MinIO) with content-derived MIME validation and optional online virus scanning (VirusTotal).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: An S3-compatible storage backend. Satellite modules like storage_s3 contribute their implementation here.

modules.name: User
modules.description: Core user CRUD: create, find, update, deactivate. Foundation for every auth and tenancy flow.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: User Preferences
modules.description: Per-user preferences: theme, language, timezone, notification opt-ins.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: User Profile
modules.description: Profile fields (avatar, bio, locale, timezone) — separated from the user entity for read scalability.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: User Security
modules.description: Password hashing, account lock, TOTP secret, WebAuthn/Passkey credentials.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: User Session
modules.description: JWT access/refresh issuance + revocation, Redis-backed session cache, CRUD on UserSession rows.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Linked Social Accounts
modules.description: Per-user linked OAuth provider accounts (provider id, external user id, tokens).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Authentication
modules.description: Credential auth: login, register, password reset, email verify, OTP, TOTP. Coordinates user, user_session, user_security, notification_mail.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: OAuth2/OIDC Engine
modules.description: Generic, config-driven OAuth2/OIDC protocol engine (authorize → token → userinfo, PKCE, refresh, private_key_jwt, Basic confidential-client auth) plus a custom/bring-your-own OIDC provider. Consumed by auth_sso (social catalog) and auth_acs (government catalog); the OIDC analogue of auth_saml.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SAML SSO
modules.description: SAML 2.0 SSO with per-tenant IdP config (SamlConfig): signature alg, dual-cert rotation, encrypted assertions, SLO, JIT-atomic provisioning, ABAC role mapping, metadata import, replay detection.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: OAuth SSO
modules.description: OAuth 2.0 SSO with 12 providers: Google, GitHub, Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Slack, TikTok, WeChat, Autodesk.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: An OAuth/OIDC SSO provider implementation. Satellite modules like auth_sso_google contribute their provider here; the host discovers them via the extension registry.

modules.name: National Identity Login
modules.description: National/government digital-identity login (e-Devlet TR/KKTC, eIDAS, SPID, Cl@ve, DE eID, Login.gov, ID.me, OneID, MyGov ID). Registry of SAML + OIDC providers keyed on a hashed national identifier (no email), with synthetic-email JIT + account-merge and platform-level config via ACS_PROVIDER_MAP.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: A national/government digital-identity (SAML or OIDC) provider implementation. Satellite modules like auth_acs_tr_edevlet contribute their provider here; the host discovers them via the extension registry. Provider descriptors and per-tenant config stay in the host's ACS_CATALOG / config service.

modules.name: Admin Impersonation
modules.description: Allow a system admin to assume a target user's session (always audited).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SCIM 2.0
modules.description: System for Cross-domain Identity Management (RFC 7643/7644). Lets enterprise IdPs (Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin, Google Workspace) auto-provision and deprovision tenant members.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant
modules.description: Tenant CRUD, lifecycle (active/suspended/deleted), soft-deletion service. Foundation of multi-tenancy.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Member
modules.description: Tenant-scoped membership join table with roles (owner/admin/member) and per-member permissions.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Invitation
modules.description: Email invitation flow: create / accept / decline / revoke. Bound to tenant_member on acceptance.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Session
modules.description: Tenant-scoped session handling: bind a user session to a specific tenant, resolve tenant from request.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Branding
modules.description: White-label branding: logo, favicon, colors, font, custom CSS — read by the proxy/shell to render per-tenant chrome.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Domain
modules.description: Custom domain mapping per tenant + DNS verification (TXT/CNAME challenge).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Subscription
modules.description: Tenant subscription state, plan + feature key resolution, grace period, expiry job.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Tenant Usage
modules.description: Usage metric tracking per tenant (API calls, storage GB, seats). Source for plan-limit enforcement.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment
modules.description: Pluggable payment processing (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico) + subscription plans, plan features, payment transactions, webhook handling.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: A payment gateway implementation (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico, ...). Satellite modules like payment_stripe contribute their gateway here; the host discovers them via the extension registry.

A gateway-specific coupon-checkout adapter. The coupon module validates a LOCAL code + computes the discount server-side, then asks the matching gateway adapter to turn it into checkout params (a one-off Stripe coupon, an iyzico negative basket line, a PayPal discount line). Nothing is synced to the gateway's coupon registry; the local code is the single source of truth. Payment gateway satellites contribute their adapter here.

modules.name: Tenant Export
modules.description: Export all per-tenant data into a downloadable archive (GDPR-friendly).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Coupon
modules.description: Discount coupons + redemption tracking. Validation and discount are computed locally (the code is the single source of truth); at checkout the discount is turned into gateway params via the payment:coupon extension point (Stripe / PayPal / Iyzico) — nothing is synced to the processor's coupon registry.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Sell
modules.description: One-time product / service payment processing. Uses payment_core providers (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico, Alipay, WeChat Pay, YooKassa, CloudPayments). Tenant-aware checkout sessions, transactions, and refunds.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Exchange Rate
modules.description: TCMB (Turkish Central Bank) FX rates with Redis caching. Converts plan prices to TRY when charging Turkish cards via iyzico.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Subscription
modules.description: Recurring subscription lifecycle: plans, plan features, subscriber management, proration, billing cycle tracking. Provider-agnostic (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico, …). Tenant-aware — every plan and subscription is scoped to a tenant.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Cart
modules.description: Tenant-aware shopping cart for users and anonymous guests. Manages cart items, quantities, coupon codes, totals, guest-to-user merge, and conversion to checkout.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Shipping
modules.description: Tenant-aware shipping methods and a rate-calculation engine. Define carriers and rate rules (by country, region, weight, subtotal) and compute shipping quotes at checkout.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Invoice
modules.description: Tenant-scoped invoicing with regional e-invoicing adapters (TR e-Arşiv, EU Peppol, US Stripe Tax). Each tenant issues its own invoices keyed to its own subscription / payment flow.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: A regional/country e-invoicing adapter (UBL-TR/GİB, Peppol BIS, FatturaPA, Chorus Pro, ZUGFeRD, CFDI, GST IRP, US Stripe Tax). Satellite modules like invoice_tr_earsiv contribute their adapter here; the host's adapters/registry discovers them via the extension registry. Routing (region vs issuer-country) is carried in each contribution's metadata { kind, code }. Shared XML helpers (xml.util, cii_xml) and the InvoiceAdapter contract stay in the host.

modules.name: In-App Notifications
modules.description: In-app notification feed with unread counts. Consumed by the notification menu in the app shell.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Email Notifications
modules.description: Pluggable email sender (SMTP, SES, Mailgun, Postmark, Resend, SendGrid). EJS templates. BullMQ-backed queue.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: An email sending backend. Satellite modules like mail_smtp contribute their implementation here.

modules.name: Web Push Notifications
modules.description: Web Push (VAPID) — subscription storage + send.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SMS Notifications
modules.description: Pluggable SMS sender (Twilio, Nexmo, Clickatell, NetGSM).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: An SMS sending backend. Satellite modules like sms_twilio contribute their implementation here.

modules.name: ZUGFeRD (DE) e-Invoicing
modules.description: ZUGFeRD (DE) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Peppol BIS (EU) e-Invoicing
modules.description: Peppol BIS (EU) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Chorus Pro (FR) e-Invoicing
modules.description: Chorus Pro (FR) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: GST IRP (IN) e-Invoicing
modules.description: GST IRP (IN) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: FatturaPA (IT) e-Invoicing
modules.description: FatturaPA (IT) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: CFDI (MX) e-Invoicing
modules.description: CFDI (MX) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: e-Arşiv (TR) e-Invoicing
modules.description: e-Arşiv (TR) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: US Standard (Stripe Tax) e-Invoicing
modules.description: US Standard (Stripe Tax) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into the invoice:adapter extension point.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Mail — SMTP
modules.description: SMTP email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Notification Log
modules.description: Unified outbound notification audit log across mail, sms, push, inapp channels.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Tax
modules.description: Tenant-aware tax/VAT calculation engine: tax classes, destination-matched rates, compound and price-inclusive computation.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Mail — SendGrid
modules.description: SendGrid email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Wishlist
modules.description: Tenant-aware wishlists / favorites. Users keep multiple named lists of products and variants, with optional public sharing via a share token.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Mail — Mailgun
modules.description: Mailgun email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Return / RMA
modules.description: Customer return, exchange and refund (RMA) requests with line items and an append-only status-event log. Tenant-aware, references orders from a future order module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Mail — Amazon SES
modules.description: Amazon SES email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Payment Loyalty Points
modules.description: Tenant-aware loyalty points program. Earn / redeem points, lifetime-driven tiers with earn multipliers, manual adjustments, transaction ledger, and point expiry.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: E-Signature & E-Identity
modules.description: Multi-country e-identity login + e-signature (eIDAS/OIDC4IDA). Pluggable providers (TR Mobil İmza, Smart-ID, BankID, itsme, FranceConnect, eIDAS-nPA, Signicat).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: A national e-signature / eID backend. Satellite modules like esign_mobil_imza contribute their implementation here.

modules.name: Mail — Postmark
modules.description: Postmark email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SEO Metadata
modules.description: Polymorphic SEO metadata (title, description, Open Graph, canonical, noIndex) attachable to any entity type via entityType + entityId pair.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: E-Signature Identity Login
modules.description: E-signature / e-identity login consumer: matches and binds qualified electronic-signature certificates (TR Mobil İmza, Smart-ID, BankID, eIDAS QSCD) to user accounts and runs the login/bind workflow. Consumes the e_signature engine for provider/crypto/identity primitives; owns the certificate↔user binding (signing_certificates).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Mail — Resend
modules.description: Resend email backend for the notification_mail module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Media Gallery
modules.description: Polymorphic ordered image gallery attachable to any entity type. Items wrap UploadedFile rows (storage module) and add gallery-side overlay: sortOrder, isPrimary, altText, title.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: API Key
modules.description: Tenant-scoped API keys for programmatic access (hashed at rest, scope-bound).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Audit Log
modules.description: Append-only audit trail for sensitive actions, stored per-tenant (platform events land on ROOT_TENANT_ID).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Store
modules.description: Tenant-aware e-commerce store. Hierarchical categories with typed spec templates; products with Tiptap richtext descriptions, spec values, multiple images, tags, SEO; variation types (Color, Size, …) with options and swatches; product variants with independent SKU / price / stock per combination; product bundles with per-item quantity and price overrides. Admin-only — no storefront UI layer.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Outgoing Webhooks
modules.description: Subscriber-configured outbound webhooks (tenant-scoped; root tenant carries platform-wide events), signed deliveries, retry+redelivery.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Order Fulfillment
modules.description: Tenant-aware fulfillment and shipment tracking for orders. Manages packing, carrier tracking, status lifecycle, and an append-only event log.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Storage — AWS S3
modules.description: AWS S3 storage backend for the storage module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Product Review
modules.description: Tenant-aware product ratings and reviews with verified-purchase flags, helpful voting, moderation lifecycle, and cached per-product rating summaries.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Storage — Cloudflare R2
modules.description: Cloudflare R2 storage backend for the storage module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Storage — DigitalOcean Spaces
modules.description: DigitalOcean Spaces storage backend for the storage module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Blog
modules.description: Tenant-scoped blog with posts, categories and threaded comments. Posts have a draft/published/archived lifecycle; comment moderation and anonymous-comment policy are per-tenant settings.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Storage — MinIO
modules.description: MinIO storage backend for the storage module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Storage — Local Filesystem
modules.description: Local filesystem storage backend for the storage module. Writes objects to a directory on disk — intended for development and offline use (e.g. publishing community plugin bundles without S3).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Messaging
modules.description: Tenant-scoped real-time messaging: 1-1 and group conversations, persisted messages with soft-delete, read/delivery cursors, typing + presence, participant roles. HTTP for writes, a standalone Socket.IO service for realtime fan-out via Redis pub/sub.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Terms & Consent
modules.description: Legal agreements + consent. Versioned, immutable, hash-stamped agreement documents (terms of use, privacy/KVKK, distance-selling, pre-information, refund policy, cookie, custom) with an append-only acceptance ledger. Reusable agreements record version+hash on acceptance; order-specific documents (distance-selling/pre-information) are rendered per order and stored verbatim. Also keeps the cookie-consent banner + per-purpose consent ledger. Checkout integration enforces required agreement acceptance before payment. Data export/erasure stays with tenant_export.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Wallet
modules.description: Internal credit / wallet ledger. Double-entry accounting where every movement is a balanced transaction whose signed postings sum to zero, with per-account tamper-evident hash chains, peer-to-peer credit transfers, issue/spend flows, and booking capture/refund. Balances are integer minor units; chain verification + reconciliation included.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Feature Flags
modules.description: Tenant-scoped feature flags with master switch, deterministic percentage rollout, attribute-based targeting rules, and per-subject (user/segment) overrides. Read-through cached for hot-path evaluation; every write is audit-logged.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Metering
modules.description: Event-based usage metering with metered / overage billing. Records immutable usage events per meter (SUM/MAX/LAST aggregation), keeps a Redis hot counter for fast current-period reads, and settles overages on a two-rail model: prepaid wallet credits are debited first, the remainder is invoiced as a draft. Quantities and money are integer minor units; runs are idempotent and persisted.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Support Desk
modules.description: Customer support-ticket desk. Customers open support tickets with per-tenant monotonic ticket numbers (e.g. TICK-2026-00001), agent assignment, internal agent-only notes, threaded messages, and first-response + resolution SLA tracking. Ticket status flows OPEN → PENDING (agent replied) → RESOLVED → CLOSED; the first agent reply records the first-response time. Lifecycle changes are written to the append-only audit log; requesters/agents are notified in-app and webhooks fire on each event.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Approval Queue
modules.description: Generic, entity-agnostic moderation / approval queue. Any owning module can route an entity through human review via the queue (keyed by entityType + entityId) with a tamper-evident per-tenant decision hash chain and an in-memory decision-handler hook. Open items are PENDING / IN_REVIEW / ESCALATED; terminal items are APPROVED / REJECTED, with a partial unique index enforcing at most one open item per entity and SLA-by-priority due dates. Every decision is recorded in the append-only audit log; submitters are notified in-app and webhooks fire on each lifecycle event.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Gift Card
modules.description: Prepaid gift cards: issue (single + bulk) hash-protected codes, track redeemable balance, and redeem into a user's wallet. Redemption posts a wallet credit in the card's currency; supports partial redemption, void, admin balance adjustment, and an expiry sweep. Builds on wallet (credit) and payment (purchase-backed issuing).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: AI
modules.description: Pluggable AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, community plugins). Provider selection, embeddings, models, usage tracking. Chat lives in the ai_chat module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: A backend AI provider (chat / embeddings / streaming). Satellite modules like ai_openai contribute their implementation here.

modules.name: Dynamic Pages
modules.description: Tenant-aware block-based page builder with i18n support. Supports code blocks (Prose, Hero, Popup Modal, Custom) and custom HTML template blocks. Public pages served at /tenant/[tenantId]/p/[slug].
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: AI Chat
modules.description: Chat playground + chat/stream endpoints. Talks to whichever provider the AI module has selected as default for the tenant.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Integrations Hub
modules.description: Third-party connector hub (Zapier-like). Owns a per-tenant connector catalog, connection state, and encrypted OAuth tokens. Outbound triggers bridge onto the webhook module (signing/retry/circuit-breaker reused); inbound actions authenticate via the api_key module. OAuth2 authorization-code + refresh flows with AES-256-GCM token storage.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Search
modules.description: Tenant-scoped full-text search over arbitrary content. Owning modules push documents (title/body/url/metadata keyed by entityType+entityId); the default PostgreSQL FTS provider ranks results with ts_rank and returns ts_headline snippets. Provider abstraction leaves room for Meilisearch/Elastic. All queries are parameterized and tenant-scoped.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: Analytics
modules.description: Tenant-scoped product analytics: append-only event tracking (page views, signups, custom events) plus aggregate reads — top-line summary (total events, unique users/sessions, top events), GROUP BY date_trunc timeseries with dense gap-filling, and top-events. Tracking works for anonymous visitors; summaries are short-cached in Redis. Distinct from metering (billing) and observability (ops metrics).
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SMS — Twilio
modules.description: Twilio SMS backend for the notification_sms module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SMS — NetGSM
modules.description: NetGSM SMS backend for the notification_sms module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SMS — Clickatell
modules.description: Clickatell SMS backend for the notification_sms module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: SMS — Vonage (Nexmo)
modules.description: Vonage (Nexmo) SMS backend for the notification_sms module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: e-Signature — Mobil İmza
modules.description: Mobil İmza national e-signature / eID provider for the e_signature module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: e-Signature — Smart-ID
modules.description: Smart-ID national e-signature / eID provider for the e_signature module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: e-Signature — BankID (SE)
modules.description: BankID (SE) national e-signature / eID provider for the e_signature module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: e-Signature — Login.gov
modules.description: Login.gov national e-signature / eID provider for the e_signature module.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan

modules.name: API Documentation
modules.description: OpenAPI/Swagger spec builder + helpers for serving per-tenant API docs.
modules.author: Kuray Karaaslan
